findings.evidence: `JHolomorphicTransport.lean:83-87` proves the natural within-at signature with arbitrary `t`; `JHolomorphic.lean:268-273` gives the setwise composition API in the same `Set.MapsTo` style, so the setwise transport proof can introduce `y ∈ t` and apply `(hf (eV.symm y) (hts hy)).transport eV eW hts`.
findings.fix: Generalize the lemma to `{t : Set V'}` with a `Set.MapsTo (fun y : V' => eV.symm y) t s` hypothesis, and derive the exact-image case/iff from that if desired.
findings.issue: `IsJHolomorphicOn.transport` hardcodes the transported domain as `(eV '' s)`, even though the within-at transport lemma immediately above accepts any `t` with `Set.MapsTo (fun y : V' => eV.symm y) t s`.

summary: The pointwise, within-at, iff, and global statements are at the expected level, but the setwise forward transport lemma is still specialized to the exact image domain while the surrounding API uses mapped-domain hypotheses.
